column1: What are the feature_data_category values available?
column2: SELECT DISTINCT feature_data_category FROM npcyf_schema."FEATURE_MASTER";

column1: How many features exist in each training_feature_set?
column2: SELECT tfs.training_feature_set_id, tfs.training_feature_set_title, COUNT(tfsf.feature_id) AS total_features FROM npcyf_schema."TRAINING_FEATURE_SET" AS tfs JOIN npcyf_schema."TRAINING_FEATURE_SET_FEATURE" AS tfsf ON tfs.training_feature_set_id = tfsf.training_feature_set_id GROUP BY tfs.training_feature_set_id, tfs.training_feature_set_title ORDER BY tfs.training_feature_set_id;

column1: Which state has the maximum number of districts in the database?
column2: SELECT s.state_name, COUNT(d.district_id) AS total_districts FROM npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d ON s.state_id = d.state_id GROUP BY s.state_name ORDER BY total_districts DESC LIMIT 1;

column1: Which state has the minimum number of districts in the database?
column2: SELECT s.state_name, COUNT(d.district_id) AS total_districts FROM npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d ON s.state_id = d.state_id GROUP BY s.state_name ORDER BY total_districts ASC LIMIT 1;

column1: How many districts exist in Bihar?
column2:
SELECT COUNT(d.district_id) AS total_districts_in_bihar
FROM npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%';

column1: What is the average reservoir level of Bihar in 2015?
column2:
SELECT AVG(l.level)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2015;

column1: Find the maximum FRL recorded in Kerala in 2020?
column2:
SELECT MAX(l.frl)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Kerala%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2020;

column1: What is the total current_live_storage of Odisha in 2018?
column2:
SELECT SUM(l.current_live_storage)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Odisha%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2018;

column1: Which state has the highest reservoir level in 2010?
column2:
SELECT s.state_name, MAX(l.level) AS max_level
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2010
GROUP BY s.state_name
ORDER BY max_level DESC
LIMIT 1;

column1: Show reservoir levels grouped by reservoir_level_recorded_year?
column2:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) AS year, AVG(l.level) AS avg_level
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

column1: What is the average reservoir level at DISTRICT level in 2016?
column2:

FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2016;

What is the maximum temperature of West Bengal in 2000?
column2:
SELECT MAX(t.temperature_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS t
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = t.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE t.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%West Bengal%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.temperature_recorded_date) = 2000;

column1: Find the average temperature of Bihar in 2010?
column2:
SELECT AVG(t.temperature_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS t
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = t.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE t.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.temperature_recorded_date) = 2010;

column1: What is the minimum temperature recorded in Kerala in 2015?
column2:
SELECT MIN(t.temperature_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS t
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = t.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE t.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Kerala%'

column1: Show yearly temperature values for Odisha?
column2:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.temperature_recorded_date) AS year,
       AVG(t.temperature_value) AS avg_temperature
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS t
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = t.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE t.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Odisha%'
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

column1: What is the maximum temperature recorded at DISTRICT level in 2018?

column1: Which state recorded the highest temperature in 2012?
column2:
SELECT s.state_name,
       MAX(t.temperature_value) AS max_temperature
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS t
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = t.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE t.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.temperature_recorded_date) = 2012
GROUP BY s.state_name
ORDER BY max_temperature DESC
LIMIT 1;

column1: Show the yearly rainfall of Bihar between 2000 and 2010?
column2: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) AS year, SUM(l.rainfall_value) FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d ON d.district_id = l.location_id JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s ON s.state_id = d.state_id WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT' AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;

column1: Which state has the highest rainfall in 2010?
